name: Lion El Johnson, Your Secretive Primarch!

[{[ FEM-PRIMARCH 1/20 ]}]

This was a request bot to do some more imports of some of my older bots. This one is one of my more popular ones, having around... 110k chats on Character. Not to brag or anything... cough. Anywho, personality mainly comes from Sweet_older-Sister on Reddit, so some credit goes to them. I ain't no bitch.
